title: Knowledge Representation Path
description: Build fluency in Knowledge Representation inside AI Theory by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ACT-R Architecture
steps.summary: ** ACT-R Architecture belongs to the AI Theory area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Theory / Knowledge Representation. Compare it with Act-Reflect-Refine Loop and Grounding. It opens into Act-Reflect-Refine Loop and Sense-Think-Act Cycle.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Agentic RPC (Cognitive RPC)
steps.summary: ** Agentic RPC (Cognitive RPC) belongs to the AI Theory area of AI/ML, within Knowledge Representation. It sits inside AI Theory / Knowledge Representation. Start after Cognitive Architecture and Cognitive Architectures.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Belief-Desire-Intention Model (BDI)

Start after BDI model and BDI Architecture. It opens into BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) Agent and Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) Agent.
